---
title: "profileSummary()"
description: "Summarize an opt-in Graph.profile() snapshot while keeping describe() as the source of node cardinality. No counters are stored on nodes (R-profile)."
---

Summarize an opt-in Graph.profile() snapshot while keeping describe() as the
source of node cardinality. No counters are stored on nodes (R-profile).

## Import

```ts
import { profileSummary } from "@graphrefly/ts/patterns";
```

## Signature

```ts
function profileSummary(
	graph: Graph,
	opts: { limit?: number } = {},
): ProfileSummary
```

| Parameter | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `graph` | `Graph` | Missing @param graph JSDoc. |
| `opts` | `{ limit?: number }` | Missing @param opts JSDoc. |

## Returns

`ProfileSummary`
